mapper.insert: INSERT INTO praise_tracks(id, title, artist_name, cover_image_url, audio_url, duration_seconds, lyrics, external_url, source_type, copyright_note, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(COALESCE(#{id}, gen_random_uuid()), #{title}, #{artistName}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{audioUrl}, #{durationSeconds}, #{lyrics}, #{externalUrl}, #{sourceType}, #{copyrightNote}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE praise_tracks SET title = #{title}, artist_name = #{artistName}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, audio_url = #{audioUrl}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, lyrics = #{lyrics}, external_url = #{externalUrl}, source_type = #{sourceType}, copyright_note = #{copyrightNote}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM praise_tracks WHERE status = 'active'
